---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-inner}
# Geometric Viewpoints on Learning, Data, and Neural Networks

::: {.subtitle}
A small local meeting bringing together researchers in Munich working near geometry, topology, mathematical machine learning, and structured neural architectures.
:::

::: {.meta}
23-25 September 2026 · Munich
:::

:::
:::

<br>
This workshop explores several geometric viewpoints on machine learning, ranging
from topology of data and representations to geometric and algebraic approaches
to neural networks and optimization. It is aimed at advanced master students and
early PhD students, and emphasizes accessible introductions to active local
research directions.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Topics
- Geometry and topology of data
- Geometry of representations and architectures
- Geometry and algebra of optimization and neural networks
:::

<!-- ::: {.info-card} -->
<!-- ### Format -->
<!---->
<!-- Invited talks, tutorial-style sessions, and coffee breaks. -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.info-card}
### Audience
Advanced master's students and PhD students working near geometry, topology, mathematical ML,
graph learning, physics-inspired ML, and adjacent areas.
:::

:::
